title: hypericum perforatum f. microphyllum
intro: Hypericum perforatum f. microphyllum, also known as dwarf St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of the flowering plant Hypericum perforatum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the reuptake of serotonin and other neurotransmitters, which has led to its use in treating mild to moderate depression. The health benefits of dwarf St. John's Wort include its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Dwarf St. John's Wort is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is typically consumed in herbal supplements, although its use should be cautioned due to potential interactions with medications.
